question: Does the model generate exactly two new UI mockup images corresponding to Page 3 and Page 4?
Does the generated image for Page 4 feature a solid purple button with the text 'Get Started', as explicitly requested?
Does the generated image for Page 3 retain the outline 'Next' button style consistent with the input pages?
Do the generated UI images maintain the same dark blue/purple gradient background and layout structure (illustration top, text middle, controls bottom) as the input?
Do the generated pages include descriptive subtitle text below the main titles, consistent with the format of the input pages?
Do the illustrations in the generated images follow the '3D abstract series style' (glassy/neon textures, spherical shapes) seen in the input?
Are the generated illustrations visually distinct from the input images and from each other (not identical copies)?
Does the illustration for Page 3 visually reflect the theme of 'Community Interaction' (e.g., connected nodes, network clusters)?
Does the illustration for Page 4 visually reflect the theme of 'Start Your Journey' (e.g., path, launch, portal)?
Are the titles 'Community Interaction' (Page 3) and 'Start Your Journey' (Page 4) clearly visible in their respective generated images?
Does the output include a text-based 'Design Specification' section?
Does the Design Specification explicitly list technical parameters for Color Values (e.g., Hex/RGB codes)?
Does the Design Specification explicitly list Font Sizes and Weights?
Does the Design Specification explicitly list Spacing values (e.g., margins, padding in px)?
Does the Design Specification explicitly define Interaction Rules (e.g., hover/pressed states) for buttons or indicators?
Are the generated UI mockup images free of severe artifacts and is the text within them legible?
Are the generated UI images inserted logically into the flow (e.g., appearing near the text describing the specific page)?
